valid.name: with-not-valid

invalid.name: missing-not-valid
invalid.code:
ALTER TABLE t ADD CONSTRAINT c_check CHECK (x > 0);
ALTER TABLE t ADD CONSTRAINT c_fk FOREIGN KEY (other_id) REFERENCES other(id);

errors.message: Add this constraint with `NOT VALID` and run `VALIDATE CONSTRAINT` separately, so the validating scan does not hold `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE` on the table.
Add this constraint with `NOT VALID` and run `VALIDATE CONSTRAINT` separately, so the validating scan does not hold `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE` on the table.
